## SEI Valuation Queried as Index Inclusion and Power Growth Thesis Build

Index inclusion events mechanically drive price moves that can distort entry points; a valuation check on SEI is timely for any power infrastructure allocation tied to the AI data center buildout thesis.

- Coverage asks whether Solaris Energy Infrastructure (SEI) is cheap following recent index inclusion.
- The power growth thesis—driven by AI data center electricity demand—is cited as the key fundamental driver.
- Index inclusion has likely triggered forced buying, raising the question of whether the re-rating overstates near-term fair value.
- No specific price target or valuation metric is provided in the headline.
